title: Headquarters and stations; establishment; discontinuance
doc_html:
§1378.  Headquarters and stations; establishment; discontinuance

The department shall, from time to time, establish headquarters and stations in the localities it thinks best suited to aid in the enforcement of the laws of this state.  

It may also, as it sees fit, discontinue any headquarters or station.
doc_text:
§1378.  Headquarters and stations; establishment; discontinuance
The department shall, from time to time, establish headquarters and stations in the localities it thinks best suited to aid in the enforcement of the laws of this state.
It may also, as it sees fit, discontinue any headquarters or station.
